# PuImgCropper

## Intent

- image cropper
- avatar crop
- image editing input

## Prefer When

- Use when users need to crop or adjust an uploaded image.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for passive image display; use PuImg.

## Import

```ts
import { PuImgCropper } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
